summary: Iter85 Phase 2/3 follow-up â€” tested quiz shuffle, tap suspicious flagging, engagement leaderboard, and backend-rendered share-card PNG. 11/14 backend tests PASS. 3 FAIL : tap /submit response is missing `suspicious` and `cheated` fields (DB columns + admin endpoints + background logic all work, but they're NOT serialized in the SubmitResponse Pydantic model â€” breaking the explicit FR contract). Frontend smoke on /services â†’ Jeux hub PASS : engagement-leaderboard, share-rank-btn ('Partager mon rang #1', enabled), 3 leaderboard rows all render.

critical.issue: Response body does NOT include `suspicious` and `cheated` fields. SubmitResponse Pydantic model (routes/tap.py L99-107) only declares run_id/taps_raw/taps_valid/points_awarded/points_cycle/bonus_awarded/timed_out/best_today. DB columns are populated correctly (confirmed via /admin/suspicious which returns them), but the user-facing /submit endpoint hides them. The problem statement explicitly requires : `cheated=true, suspicious=true (>=100), points=120+50 bonus` in the response.

action_items: Add `suspicious: bool` and `cheated: bool` to SubmitResponse model in /app/backend/routes/tap.py (~line 99-107) AND pass them in the final `return SubmitResponse(...)` at ~line 259. The values are already computed at lines 210-217 â€” just expose them.
Nice-to-have : also expose `taps_per_second` or `threshold_info` so the UI can show a gentle warning banner to the user when suspicious=true (educates rather than silently flags).
critical_code_review_comments: routes/tap.py /submit : values for `cheated` and `suspicious` are correctly computed and persisted to DB (SQL at line 233-238 includes them), but the API response DTO drops them. This is the root cause of the 3 test failures and violates the iter83/85 FR.

routes/engagement_leaderboard.py weekly endpoint : `me` key is None when user has zero wheel_spins rows this week â€” current behaviour is graceful (tests pass). UI should handle `me: null` gracefully which frontend appears to do.
engagement_leaderboard._render_card_png : PNG renders correctly (>20KB), Pillow 12.x is installed and available. Font fallbacks work. No SSRF risk (local avatar only).
Quiz shuffling : options_order persisted as array-of-arrays [[0,1,2,3],â€¦]. Unshuffle via perm.index(original) works. 3/3 quiz tests green.
Minor : routes/tap.py SubmitResponse uses BaseModel without model_config = ConfigDict(extra='allow'). Adding `suspicious`/`cheated` to the model is the only correct fix (not runtime kwargs).

success_rate.backend: 79% (11/14) â€” 3 failures all same root cause (missing fields in SubmitResponse)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (engagement-leaderboard renders, share-rank-btn present + enabled + labelled with rank, 3 top-10 rows visible)

seed_data_creation: Uses admin reset-user endpoints between tap/quiz tests for deterministic quotas.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://japap-refactor.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest backend/tests/test_iter85_shuffling_virality.py -v -p no:ethereum`. Full run ~80s. Once SubmitResponse is patched the 3 TapSuspicious tests will go green. Backend sometimes hits a 502 after a file save while hot-reload restarts â€” if all tests fail with 502 in <1s, wait ~30s and retry. Also, navigation to /games direct URL redirects to /feed â€” the games hub is rendered via /services â†’ Jeux tab (ServicesPage.js L326 mounts GamesModule).
rca of the issue: DB layer of /api/tap/submit computes `cheated = taps_raw > ceiling` (L210) and `suspicious = taps_valid >= 100` (L213) and persists both via UPDATE at L233. However the Pydantic SubmitResponse (L99-107) omits them, and the final `return SubmitResponse(run_id=..., taps_raw=..., ..., best_today=...)` at L259 doesn't pass them either. Fix = add 2 bool fields to the model + pass them in the return statement. Tests already assert on r.json()['suspicious'] and r.json()['cheated']. Admin /overview and /suspicious endpoints already use the same DB columns correctly (tests green).
